prompt: Bubble pressure proxy: choose the best action.
why_v1: Fold protects tournament life when pressure and risk premium are too high.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Folding fits the tournament cue set, so the line protects tournament life when the pressure and payout cost are against you.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Folding is stronger here because bubble pressure creates a real risk premium, so preserving tournament life matters more than chasing a thin chip gain. If the hand cannot continue comfortably through pressure, releasing it is better than paying off with a marginal stack-off.
